## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Build or CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn verify` passes locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated for user-visible fixes, features, or behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or usage changes.
- [ ] New or changed behavior has appropriate tests.

## Notes for Reviewers

Add any risk, trade-off, or follow-up context.
